## A2UIProps.wrapSurface property

Wrap each top-level surface so consumers can apply an outer theme shell, wrapper className, or additional styles.

**Signature:**

```typescript
wrapSurface?: (children: ReactNode, ctx: {
        surfaceId: string;
    }) => ReactNode;
```
